title: File Type Invariants v1
description: Canonical invariants for file kinds, naming patterns, and versioning used by AI-Chat and coding tools.

fileKinds.description: Declared file kinds that may exist in the VM-Constellation.

namingPatterns.description: Stable filename patterns keyed by fileKind and objectKind.

objectKind.description: Canonical objectKind for this file (e.g., dungeonRunContract, directorPersonaContract).

pattern.description: Filename pattern using a constrained token set, e.g. 'schemas/contracts/{objectId}.v1.json'.

extension.description: Required file extension for this pattern.

authoringConstraints.description: Constraints applied to AI authoring and coding tools when generating or modifying files.

requireExplicitTarget.description: If true, all AI authoring sessions must declare fileKind and targetPath up-front.

forbidAdHocRename.description: If true, tools may not change filenames once created without an explicit supersedes record.

requireStableFileId.description: If true, each file must carry a stable fileId in its metadata that does not change across edits.
